## Summary

## Linked issue / milestone

Closes #

## Architecture impact

- [ ] No architecture change
- [ ] ADR added or updated

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `mypy src`
- [ ] Secret/decrypted-data scan completed

## Evidence

Include relevant test output, trace IDs, benchmark revision, and configuration digest. Never paste credentials or decrypted benchmark ground truth.
